title: Did Google Just Fall Behind Again?, WWDC Preview, Anthropic Files To Go Public
summary: Analysis of whether Google is falling behind in AI as OpenAI and Anthropic advance with coding agents and super-app strategies. Discusses how AI agents may reshape web, email, apps, and browser usage, potentially putting Google at a disadvantage. Also covers Apple's WWDC, Meta's subscription strategy, and Anthropic's IPO filing.
